channel.title: caad s on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in caad s on changcui

item.title: 377. Combination Sum IV
item.description: class Solution { public: int combinationSum4(vector<int>& nums, int target) { vector<unsigned int> dp(target + 1, 0); dp[0] = 1; for (int i = 1; i <= target; i++) { for (auto num : nums) { if (i - num >= 0) dp[i] += dp[i - num]; } } return dp.back(); } };
